testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_161] Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_353] Ensure that RDS instances have performance insights enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_157] Ensure that RDS instances have Multi-AZ enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_129] Ensure that respective logs of Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) are enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability

[NONE][CKV_AWS_226] Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_16] Ensure all data stored in the RDS is securely encrypted at rest

[NONE][CKV_AWS_118] Ensure that enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon RDS instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_293] Ensure that AWS database instances have deletion protection enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_322] Ensure ElastiCache for Redis cache clusters have auto minor version upgrades enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_323] Ensure ElastiCache clusters do not use the default subnet group

[NONE][CKV_AWS_28] Ensure DynamoDB point in time recovery (backup) is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_28] Ensure DynamoDB point in time recovery (backup) is enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_163] Ensure ECR image scanning on push is enabled

[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_30] Ensure Postgres RDS as aws_db_instance has Query Logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure Postgres RDS as aws_db_instance has Query Logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_db_instance.postgresql File: /data.tf: 12-37 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-postgres-rds-has-query-logging-enabled
12 | resource "aws_db_instance" "postgresql" { 13 | identifier = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" 14 | engine = "postgres" 15 | engine_version = "15.7" 16 | instance_class = "db.t3.micro" 17 | allocated_storage = 20 18 | storage_type = "gp2" 19 | storage_encrypted = true 20 | db_name = var.db_name 21 | username = var.db_username 22 | password = var.db_password 23 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.rds.name 24 | vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.rds.id] 25 | backup_retention_period = 1 26 | skip_final_snapshot = true 27 | deletion_protection = true 28 | multi_az = true 29 | copy_tags_to_snapshot = true 30 | iam_database_authentication_enabled = true 31 | performance_insights_enabled = true 32 | performance_insights_kms_key_id = "alias/aws/rds" 33 | enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports = ["postgresql", "upgrade"] 34 | auto_minor_version_upgrade = true 35 | monitoring_interval = 60 36 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-postgresql" } 37 | }

failure.message: Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure KMS key Policy is defined

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

failure.message: Ensure that an S3 bucket has a lifecycle configuration

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_28] Ensure public facing ALB are protected by WAF

failure.message: Ensure public facing ALB are protected by WAF

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.external File: /ecs.tf: 27-46 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-public-facing-alb-are-protected-by-waf
27 | resource "aws_lb" "external" { 28 | name = "${var.project_name}-alb-external" 29 | internal = false 30 | load_balancer_type = "application" 31 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] 32 | subnets = [aws_subnet.public_a.id, aws_subnet.public_b.id] 33 | 34 | drop_invalid_header_fields = true 35 | 36 | enable_deletion_protection = true 37 | 38 | access_logs { 39 | bucket = aws_s3_bucket.alb_logs.id 40 | prefix = "alb" 41 | enabled = true 42 | } 43 | 44 | 45 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-alb-external" } 46 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_144] Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled

failure.message: Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled
